text: Key growth drivers include consumer engagement initiatives and digital platform expansion. The bank's fourth annual More Rewards Day program, scheduled for November 6, 2025, has generated approximately $74 million in extra rewards for credit cardholders during the first three annual events, with cardholders on pace to earn a total of $100 million since inception. The company also launched community-focused initiatives such as the Golf with Us program, which has logged more than 100,000 rounds of golf since its April launch, targeting younger demographics. Revenue growth has shown improvement, with Q3 2025 revenue reaching $48.221 billion representing 3.33% year-over-year growth, while net income grew 19.01% year-over-year to $8.469 billion in Q3 2025.
